args.query: SELECT * FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT * FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    caseid__c,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue__c != 'None'
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
),
cases_handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    newvalue__c as agent_id
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue__c != 'None'
)
SELECT 
  tc.agent_id,
  COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count
FROM transfer_counts tc
INNER JOIN cases_handled ch ON tc.agent_id = ch.agent_id
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC
LIMIT 10;

args.query:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    caseid__c,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue__c != 'None'
),
agents_handling_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    newvalue__c as agent_id
  FROM owner_assignments
),
transfers_initiated AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue__c != 'None'
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
),
all_agents_with_transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    a.agent_id,
    COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count
  FROM agents_handling_cases a
  LEFT JOIN transfers_initiated t ON a.agent_id = t.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id, transfer_count
FROM all_agents_with_transfers
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC
LIMIT 10;

WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    caseid__c,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue__c != 'None'
),
agents_handling_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    newvalue__c as agent_id
  FROM owner_assignments
),
transfers_initiated AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue__c != 'None'
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
),
all_agents_with_transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    a.agent_id,
    COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count
  FROM agents_handling_cases a
  LEFT JOIN transfers_initiated t ON a.agent_id = t.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id, transfer_count
FROM all_agents_with_transfers
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC
LIMIT 10;

args.query:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    caseid__c,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue__c != 'None'
),
transfers_initiated AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue__c != 'None'
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    newvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as case_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
),
agent_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    acc.agent_id,
    acc.case_count,
    COALESCE(ti.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count
  FROM agent_case_counts acc
  LEFT JOIN transfers_initiated ti ON acc.agent_id = ti.agent_id
  WHERE acc.case_count > 0
)
SELECT agent_id, case_count, transfer_count
FROM agent_stats
WHERE transfer_count = 0
ORDER BY case_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

args.query:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    caseid__c,
    LTRIM(oldvalue__c, '#') as oldvalue__c,
    LTRIM(newvalue__c, '#') as newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND TRIM(newvalue__c) != 'None'
    AND TRIM(newvalue__c) != ''
),
transfers_initiated AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND TRIM(oldvalue__c) != 'None'
    AND TRIM(oldvalue__c) != ''
    AND oldvalue__c != newvalue__c
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    newvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as case_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
),
agent_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    acc.agent_id,
    acc.case_count,
    COALESCE(ti.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count
  FROM agent_case_counts acc
  LEFT JOIN transfers_initiated ti ON acc.agent_id = ti.agent_id
  WHERE acc.case_count > 0
)
SELECT agent_id, transfer_count
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    caseid__c,
    LTRIM(oldvalue__c, '#') as oldvalue__c,
    LTRIM(newvalue__c, '#') as newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND TRIM(newvalue__c) != 'None'
    AND TRIM(newvalue__c) != ''
),
transfers_initiated AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND TRIM(oldvalue__c) != 'None'
    AND TRIM(oldvalue__c) != ''
    AND oldvalue__c != newvalue__c
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    newvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as case_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
),
agent_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    acc.agent_id,
    acc.case_count,
    COALESCE(ti.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count
  FROM agent_case_counts acc
  LEFT JOIN transfers_initiated ti ON acc.agent_id = ti.agent_id
  WHERE acc.case_count > 0
)
SELECT agent_id, transfer_count
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
